snippet.description:
temu avengers

Unstable SMP: The LAW

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  @Spokeishere  
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @LettuceK @JadenMAN @minutetechmc @PrinceZam @MapiccMc @jumperwho @PurpledMC @Boosfer @Lomedy @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @TheobaldTheBird 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (FlameFrags themes!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] ONLY FRIENDS : DREAM ON
snippet.description:
Romeo & Romeo ละครเวทีที่ถูกนำมาดัดแปลงจากวรรณกรรมสุดคลาสสิกอย่าง Romeo & Juliet โดยนักศึกษาชั้นปี 4 แจ็ค (เอิร์ท พิรพัฒน์) ที่อยากตีความใหม่ในบริบทของผู้ชายสองคนที่รักกัน โดยมี ดีน (มิกซ์ สหภาพ) นักแสดงคู่บุญของแจ็คควบตำแหน่งแฟนเก่าที่เพิ่งเลิกกันไปตอนปีสาม และ ราฟฟี่ (บูม ธราธร) เพื่อนร่วมคณะที่แอบชอบแจ็คตั้งแต่ปีหนึ่ง และ อาโนลด์ (จอส เวอาห์) หนุ่มหล่อเอกเต้นที่ ตั้ว (กวิน แคสกี้) รูมเมทของดีน แนะนำให้มาออดิชันเพื่อรับบทเป็น “โรมิโอ” ทั้งสองคน นอกจากนั้นยังมี โรม (อู๋ ธนบูรณ์) หนุ่มคารมดีเอกดนตรีมาร่วมทำละครเวทีเรื่องนี้ด้วย ติดตามเรื่องราวการทำละครเวทีของแก๊งเพื่อนมหาลัยพร้อมกับการทำตามความฝันที่ต้องใช้ใจใน  “Only Friends : Dream On” ทุกวันศุกร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ดูทีวี ช่องวัน31 |  ดูย้อนหลัง แอป oneD ที่เดียว เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 27 กุมภาพันธ์นี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ภิญญา จู่คำศรี

รายชื่อนักแสดง
เอิร์ท พิรพัฒน์ วัฒนเศรษสิริ  รับบท  แจ็ค
มิกซ์ สหภาพ วงศ์ราษฎร์  รับบท  ดีน
จอส เวอาห์ แสงเงิน  รับบท  อาโนลด์
กวิน แคสกี้  รับบท  ตั้ว
อู๋ ธนบูรณ์ เกียรตินิรันดร์  รับบท  โรม
บูม ธราธร จันทรวรกาญจน์  รับบท  ราฟฟี่   
สุดยอด พัฐสิฏ เพิ่มพูลสวัสดิ์  รับบท  ทิมมี่
นีโอ ตรัย นิ่มทวัฒน์  รับบท  บอสตัน
ฟลุ๊ค ณัฐนนท์ ทองแสง  รับบท  พีท
ป๊อด ศุภกร ศรีโพธิ์ทอง  รับบท  เกมเพลย์

snippet.title: Dato' Awie - Di Penjara Janji 'Live' at Konsert Sembilu: The Reunion
snippet.description:
Sebuah lagu rock klasik Malaysia, dihidupkan semula pada malam yang penuh sejarah.
Persembahan ini memberi dimensi baharu kepada sebuah lagu yang telah lama bertakhta di hati ramai. Emosi yang mentah, susunan muzik yang dinamik, dan aura Awie yang tiada tandingan — semuanya dirakam secara langsung di atas pentas.
Sebuah anthem rock Malaysia. Dihidupkan kembali.

A Malaysian rock classic, brought back to life on a historic night.
This performance brings new depth to a song that has long reigned in the hearts of many. Raw emotion, dynamic arrangements, and Awie’s unmistakable aura — all captured live on stage.
A Malaysian rock anthem. Reawakened.

Music Director/Piano: Aubrey Suwito
Drums: Derrick Siow
Bass: Gideon 
Guitar: Nan Alias 
Guitar: Wan Gigi
Percussions: Pa’ang Zaman
Keyboards: Firdaus Mahmud
Backing Vocals: Wardina, Mimi, & Anep  
Strings: led by Brian Larson
ProTools Operator: Zachary Suwito
FOH Sound Engineer: Jim Teh

snippet.title: Westlife - My Love (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Westlife - My Love (Lyrics)

🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

Lyrics:

[Verse 1: Shane]
An empty street, an empty house
A hole inside my heart
I'm all alone, the rooms are getting smaller
I wonder how, I wonder why
I wonder where they are
The days we had, the songs we sang together
Oh yeah

[Pre-Chorus: All, Shane]
And oh, my love
I'm holding on forever
Reaching for the love that seems so far

[Chorus: All]
So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again, my love

[Verse 2: Brian]
I try to read, I go to work
I'm laughing with my friends
But I can't stop, to keep myself from thinking, oh no
I wonder how, I wonder why
I wonder where they are
The days we had the songs, we sang together
Oh yeah 

[Pre-Chorus: All, Shane]
And oh, my love
I'm holding on forever
Reaching for the love that seems so far

[Chorus: All]
So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again

[Bridge: Markus]
To hold you in my arms
To promise you my love
To tell you from the heart
You're all I'm thinking of
I'm reaching for the love that seems so far

[Chorus: All, Markus, Shane]
(So) So I say a little prayer
And hope my dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again, my love
Overseas from coast to coast (Overseas)
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again (My love)

[Outro: All, Shane, Brian]
So I say a little prayer
My sweet love
Dreams will take me there
Where the skies are blue
To see you once again (Oh, my love)
Overseas from coast to coast
To find a place I love the most
Where the fields are green
To see you once again, my love

snippet.title: SIENNA SPIRO - Die On This Hill (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🍕SIENNA SPIRO - Die On This Hill (Lyrics)

🍕Lyrics:

[Verse 1]
Got me to stay, said that you need me
Starved 'cause his words don't have a meaning
No, they don't, at least not to me
There'll be a day I'll be more creative
A poetic way to say, "I'm not leaving"
To the world, not to your face, mm

[Chorus]
I'll take my pride, stand here for you
No, I'm not blind, just seeing it through
You'd take my life just for the thrill
I'll take tonight and die on this hill
I always will

[Verse 2]
Know that I look stubborn, impatient
But you wrote the book, I just took a page out
To be loved, to be loved and nothing more
And you kept your word, do you want a medal?
The way that someone leaves this world
Is all just levels to me now, oh, to me now

[Chorus]
I'll take my pride, stand here for you
Know I'm not blind, just seeing it through
You'd take my life just for the thrill
I'll take tonight and die on this hill
I always will

[Bridge]
I'll be here the whole night
I'll be here 'cause I can
Yeah, I know you don't care
I know nothing could matter
God, I wish something mattered to you

[Chorus]
I'll take my pride, stand here for you
Know I'm not blind, just seeing it through
You'd take my life just for the thrill
I'll take tonight and die on this hill
I always, always, I always will
